ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a Cypher query?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(tag:Tag {name: 'cypher'}),
    p2 = (u:User {uuid: 12345})-[r2:ASKED]->(q),
    p3 = (q)-[r3:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {title: 'Best practices for Cypher'})-[r4:PROVIDED]->(u)
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What impact does the tag "cypher" have on the engagement metrics of the question "How to build a Cypher query," specifically in terms of answer acceptance rates and view counts for users with the UUID 12345?

cypher: MATCH (u:User {uuid: 12345})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question {title: "How to build a Cypher query"})\nMATCH (q)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "cypher"})\nRETURN q.view_count, q.answer_count, q.is_accepted
